settingsDesc: Manage your club profile, branding, and account configuration.
slugNote: Slug cannot be changed once set. Contact support to update.
contactNote: These details appear on public pages.
logoNote: Upload a logo file (PNG, JPG, SVG, or WebP) or paste a public URL.
customSubdomainDesc: Use your own domain for the player portal.
cnameStep1: Log in to your domain registrar
cnameStep2: Go to DNS settings for your domain
cnameStep3: Add a CNAME record pointing your subdomain to:
dnsPropagation: DNS propagation may take up to 48 hours.

certStatus.retryQueued: Ana sake duba matsayin takardar shaida…
certStatus.emailNote: Za mu aika imel ga masu kula da kulob lokacin da HTTPS ya fara aiki ko ya gaza — ba kwa buƙatar kallon wannan shafin.
certStatus.lastNotifiedActive: An sanar wa masu kula a karshe: HTTPS yana aiki a {{when}}
certStatus.lastNotifiedFailed: An sanar wa masu kula a karshe: HTTPS ya gaza a {{when}}
certStatus.nextRenudgeNone: Babu sake tunatarwa da aka tsara.
certStatus.snoozeFailed: Ba a iya jinkirta tunatarwar ba.
certStatus.snoozeCancelled: An soke jinkirin — tunatarwa za su ci gaba.
certStatus.snoozeCancelFailed: Ba a iya soke jinkirin ba.
certStatus.snoozeEndedBanner: Ka jinkirta wadannan tunatarwa har zuwa {{when}} — lokacin jinkirin ya kare, don haka muna sake tunatar da kai.

channels.description: These are the messaging channels available for player notifications.

ghin.integrationDesc: Configure your GHIN API credentials for automatic WHS score posting.
ghin.encKeyDesc: The ENCRYPTION_SECRET environment variable is not set.
ghin.encKeyFallback: Server-level credentials are available as a fallback.
ghin.playersWithGhin: {{count}} player has a GHIN number on file.
ghin.playersWithGhin_plural: {{count}} players have a GHIN number on file.

toasts.rulesConfigSaveFailed: An kasa adana saitin Mataimakin Ka'idoji

rulesAssistantDesc: Zaɓi yarukan ƙungiyar gudanarwa da Mataimakin Ka'idoji na AI zai yi amfani da su, kuma rubuta Ka'idojin Cikin Gida na kulob dinka don mataimakin ya girmama su lokacin amsa wa 'yan wasa.
rulesGoverningBodyNote: R&A da USGA suna raba Ka'idojin Golf iri ɗaya, amma suna amfani da yaruka daban-daban na gudanarwa da lambobin Ka'idojin Cikin Gida. Zaɓi wanda kwamitinka ke bi.
localRulesContentDesc: Rubuta Ka'idojin Cikin Gida da yanayin gasa na kulob dinka. Mataimakin Ka'idoji zai ambace su lokacin da suka dace. Rubutu mai sauƙi ko Markdown — har zuwa haruffa 20,000.
localRulesPlaceholder:
# Ka'idojin Cikin Gida

1. Wajen iyaka: an bayyana ta da farin sanduna a gefen fairway na 7…
2. Wuraren hukunci: tafkin a rami na 12 yanki ne mai ja na hukunci…
3. Hanyoyin keke: 'yantar kyauta a ƙarƙashin Ka'ida 16.1

walletRefundDigestPaused.warningEdited: Wadannan masu karba suna cikin jerin toshewa kuma za a yi musu watsi a shiru a karo na gaba. Ƙara adireshin da ke aiki ko cire toshewa a kasa.
walletRefundDigestPaused.warningSaved: Wadannan masu karba suna cikin jerin toshewa kuma za a yi musu watsi a shiru a karo na gaba.
walletRefundDigestPaused.saveToastTitle: An ajiye — amma wasu masu karba an dakatar
walletRefundDigestPaused.saveToastDescription: Adireshi {{count}} yana cikin jerin toshewa na mayarwa / cire rajista kuma za a yi masa watsi a shiru a karo na gaba. Duba gargadin a kasa.
walletRefundDigestPaused.saveToastDescription_other: Adireshi {{count}} suna cikin jerin toshewa na mayarwa / cire rajista kuma za a yi musu watsi a shiru a karo na gaba. Duba gargadin a kasa.
walletRefundDigestPaused.unsuppressToastRestored: {{email}} na iya karbar takaitattun bayanai kuma da aka mayar da shi a jerin masu karba.
walletRefundDigestPaused.unsuppressToastDefault: {{email}} na iya karbar takaitattun bayanai a karo na gaba.

levyLedgerDigestPaused.chipTitle: Mai karba daya ko fiye yana cikin jerin toshewa na mayarwa / cire rajista kuma za a tsallake shi
levyLedgerDigestPaused.panelHeader: An dakatar kwanan nan — za a yi watsi da wadannan adireshin a shiru a karo na gaba
levyLedgerDigestPaused.rowAutoRemoved: an cire ta atomatik a karo na karshe
levyLedgerDigestPaused.removeButtonTitle: Cire daga jerin toshewa don wannan adireshin ya iya karbar takaitattun bayanan littafi kuma
levyLedgerDigestPaused.fromRunHistoryTitle: An riga an dage toshewa; adireshin zai karbi takaitaccen bayani na gaba idan ka mayar da shi a jerin masu karba.

levyLedgerDigestPaused.saveToastDescription_other: Adireshi {{count}} suna cikin jerin toshewa na mayarwa / cire rajista kuma za a yi musu watsi a shiru a karo na gaba. Duba gargadin a kasa.

walletTopupRefunds.title: Cikar walat ɗin da aka mayar da kuɗi ta atomatik
walletTopupRefunds.intro: Duk wani cikin walat da aikin daidaitawa ya mayar da kuɗi ta atomatik — yana da amfani lokacin da memba ya gaya wa ƙungiyar Kuɗi cewa an cire kuɗi a katinsu amma walat ɗinsu bai sami kuɗi ba.
walletTopupRefunds.invalidRangeDescription: Kwanan wata na “daga” dole ne ya kasance a kan ko gabanin kwanan wata na “zuwa”.
walletTopupRefunds.refundsEmpty: Babu cikin walat da aka mayar ta atomatik don wannan tace.

walletRefundDigestSchedule.title: Aika wannan taƙaitawa zuwa Kuɗi a kan tsari
walletRefundDigestSchedule.description: Aika ta atomatik CSV ɗin cikar walat da aka mayar a kowane mako ko wata don daidaitawa ta gudana gabaɗaya daga akwatin saƙo — ba tare da buƙatar tunawa a shiga ba.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.recipientsLabel: Masu karɓa (an raba ta wakafi ko sarari)
walletRefundDigestSchedule.saveToastTitle: An adana tsarin taƙaitawar mayarwar atomatik
walletRefundDigestSchedule.saveToastEnabled: Kuɗi za su karɓi CSV ɗin mayarwa na gaba ta atomatik.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.saveToastPaused: An dakatar da tsari; ba za a aika imel ba.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.removeConfirm: A cire tsarin imel ɗin mayarwar walat ta atomatik?
walletRefundDigestSchedule.previewWaitSeconds_one: Don Allah jira daƙiƙa {{count}} kafin aika wani bayyanannan.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.previewWaitSeconds_other: Don Allah jira daƙiƙa {{count}} kafin aika wani bayyanannan.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.previewWaitGeneric: Don Allah jira ɗan lokaci kafin aika wani bayyanannan.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.sendNowWaitSeconds_one: Don Allah jira daƙiƙa {{count}} kafin aika wani taƙaitawa.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.sendNowWaitSeconds_other: Don Allah jira daƙiƙa {{count}} kafin aika wani taƙaitawa.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.sendNowWaitGeneric: Don Allah jira ɗan lokaci kafin aika wani taƙaitawa.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.sendNowSentDescription_one: An isar da layi {{rowCount}} na mayarwa a cikin kuɗi {{currencyCount}} ga mai karɓa {{recipientCount}}.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.sendNowSentDescription_other: An isar da layuka {{rowCount}} na mayarwa a cikin kuɗi {{currencyCount}} ga masu karɓa {{recipientCount}}.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.languageBanner: Masu karɓa za su sami wannan taƙaitawa cikin yarensu da suka fi so. Masu karɓa na waje suna komawa zuwa <lang>{{language}}</lang> — yaren tsoho na ƙungiyarka.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.languageFallbackWarning: Yaren da aka adana na ƙungiyarka (“{{configured}}”) ba a fassara ba don wannan taƙaitawa, don haka yaren maye don masu karɓa na waje shine Turanci.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.languageFallbackWarningNoConfig: Yaren da aka adana na ƙungiyarka ba a fassara ba don wannan taƙaitawa, don haka yaren maye don masu karɓa na waje shine Turanci.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.languagePreviewHint: Yi amfani da “Aika bayyanannan” don karɓar kwafi a kowane yare da ake tallafawa a akwatin saƙonka kafin masu kuɗi su gani.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.recipientPreferenceUntranslated: · zaɓin “{{language}}” ba a fassara ba tukuna
walletRefundDigestSchedule.recipientPreferenceMismatchTooltip: Zaɓin yare da aka adana na wannan mai karɓa shine {{preferred}}, amma ba a fassara ba don wannan taƙaitawa, don haka zai karɓi {{resolved}} maimakon haka.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.previewLanguageTitle: Yaren da za a yi bayyanannan da shi. Wannan zaɓi yana shafar wannan bayyanannan kawai — ba ya canza tsari ko yaren tsoho na ƙungiyarka.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.sendPreviewButtonTitle: Aika kwafi mai karɓa ɗaya na wannan taƙaitawa, a yaren da aka zaɓa, zuwa akwatin saƙonka.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.historyEmpty: Ba a aika imel ɗin taƙaitawa ba tukuna.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.previewDialogTitle: Bayyanannan — imel ɗin taƙaitawa na gaba
walletRefundDigestSchedule.previewDialogDescription: Haka imel ɗin tsararren na gaba zai yi kama da idan an aiko shi yanzu. Ba a aika komai ba kuma ba a rubuta wani gudu ba.

marketingSiteRefresh.notRefreshedYet: Ba a sabunta ba tukuna — aikin sabuntawa na lokaci-lokaci zai sake ɗaukar wannan a cikin mako guda.
marketingSiteRefresh.refreshFailed: Ba a iya sabuntawa daga {{host}} ba — {{error}}. Har yanzu ana ba da kwafin da aka adana — manna sabon URL a sama don sake gwadawa.
marketingSiteRefresh.refreshFailedWithDate: Ba a iya sabuntawa daga {{host}} ba — {{error}} a {{when}}. Har yanzu ana ba da kwafin da aka adana — manna sabon URL a sama don sake gwadawa.
